detail.description:
Dunk City Dynasty is an NBA and NBPA licensed 3v3 streetball mobile game where you can takeover the streets with NBA superstars like Stephen Curry, Kevin Durant, Paul George, Luka Dončić, James Harden and many more! With different teams to choose from, you can dive into exciting game modes like 11-point, Full Court 5v5, and Ranked matches for hours of entertainment.

You can also team up with friends or customize your favorite players' outfits, from NBA jerseys to stylish streetwear, to create a
detail.releaseNotes:
Welcome to the New Season
[New Season] "April 2026 Playoff Showdown" Season Starts Now
Win 50 games in Ranked this season to claim the brand new Celebration "Toma Dance".

[New Stars]
Superstar Paul Pierce: Known for his versatility, outstanding basketball IQ, and strong competitive spirit. As a talented forward, he excels in tough offensive situations and possesses excellent shooting
skills, including three-point and mid-range shots. His broad shoulders and well-rounded skill set often give him an advantage in matchups.
Superstar Victor Wembanyama: A generational talent with an unprecedented physical profile, blending elite rim protection and outside shooting with the ability to create his own shot and finish at the rim.
Legend Superstar Allen Iverson: Celebrated for his unstoppable crossover and a defiant competitive spirit that knew no equal. He tore through defenses with explosive, blurring speed, fearlessly finishing
amongst giants with a lightning-quick release on his signature jumpers and layups.
Star Player Tyler Herro: Known for his sharp perimeter shooting, consistent touch, and clutch-time finishing. Excels at finding open spots through off-ball movement, using his 3-pointers and pull-up shots to
break down defenses.

[New Events]
Anniversary Celebration Iverson Bargain Event: Invite friends to bargain for you, and get a chance to purchase for as low as 2,500 Diamonds.
Anniversary Cake Party: Log in or play games to earn Cake Counts. Use them to claim rewards like Candies, Diamonds, Superstar Vouchers, and Superstar Talent Cards.
Anniversary Candy House: Log in to claim free Candies. Use them in Candy House to purchase exclusive rewards including: Anniversary Superstar Choice Chests, Black Cards, and returning Advanced Costume Packs!
Log in on May 21 to claim: Anniversary Exclusive Avatar Background, Superstar Voucher x10, and Trend Voucher x10.

[New Costumes]
Limited-time Costumes added. Advanced Costume [Rebound Bull], and Uncommon Costume [Bulls of Victory].

[New Jerseys]
Capture the classic moments to relive the legendary stories! This season's "Jerseys & Components" Supply Crate will feature [Pierce 07-08 Exclusive] Jersey, [Wembanyama 24-25 Exclusive] Jersey, and [Iverson 00-01 Home/Away Exclusive] Jersey.
